scripts.test: pnpm run test:workspace && pnpm run test:packages
scripts.docker:dev:web: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file .tmp/loomic-local.env up web
scripts.docker:dev:web:detach: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file .tmp/loomic-local.env up -d web
scripts.docker:dev:web:stop: docker compose -f docker-compose.local.yml -f docker-compose.dev.yml --env-file .tmp/loomic-local.env stop web
